freezer.en: Keep the ice cream in the freezer.
freezer.zh: 把冰淇淋放在冷凍庫裡。

frequent.en: He is a frequent visitor to the library.

fright.en: The loud bang gave me a fright.
fright.zh: 那巨大的聲響嚇了我一跳。

fuel.zh: 車子需要燃料才能行駛。

fund.en: They raised funds for the school.

fur.en: The cat has soft gray fur.
fur.zh: 這隻貓有柔軟的灰色毛皮。

gallon.en: He bought a gallon of milk.

gamble.en: It is risky to gamble with money.

gang.en: A gang of boys played in the park.

gap.en: There is a gap between the two desks.
gap.zh: 兩張桌子之間有個縫隙。

garage.en: He parked the car in the garage.

gasoline-gas.en: The car ran out of gasoline.

geography.en: We study mountains and rivers in geography.
geography.zh: 我們在地理課學習山和河。

gesture.en: He made a friendly gesture with his hand.
gesture.zh: 他用手做了個友善的手勢。

glance.en: She took a quick glance at the clock.
glance.zh: 她快速地瞥了一眼時鐘。

glory.en: The team won glory for the school.
glory.zh: 這支隊伍為學校贏得了榮耀。

glow.en: The candles glowed in the dark.
glow.zh: 蠟燭在黑暗中發出微光。

golf.en: My father plays golf on weekends.
golf.zh: 我爸爸週末打高爾夫球。

gossip.zh: 別散播別人的閒言閒語。

governor.zh: 州長造訪了我們的城鎮。

grab.en: She grabbed her bag and ran out.
grab.zh: 她抓起包包就跑了出去。

graduate.en: She will graduate from college next year.

grasshopper.en: A grasshopper jumped in the grass.

grassy.en: We sat on a grassy hill.
grassy.zh: 我們坐在一座長滿草的山丘上。

greedy.en: The greedy man wanted all the gold.
greedy.zh: 那個貪心的人想要所有的金子。

greenhouse.en: They grow tomatoes in a greenhouse.

grin.en: He gave me a wide grin.

grocery.en: Mom went to the grocery store.

gum.en: He chewed a piece of gum.

hairdresser.en: The hairdresser cut my hair short.
hairdresser.zh: 髮型師把我的頭髮剪短了。

hammer.en: He used a hammer to fix the fence.

handful.en: She gave the bird a handful of seeds.

handkerchief.en: He wiped his face with a handkerchief.

handy.en: A small knife is handy when camping.
handy.zh: 露營時一把小刀很方便。

hanger.en: Hang your coat on the hanger.
hanger.zh: 把你的外套掛在衣架上。

harbor.en: Many boats stayed in the harbor.

harm.en: Too much sun can harm your skin.
harm.zh: 曬太多太陽會傷害你的皮膚。

harmful.en: Smoking is harmful to your health.

hatch.en: The eggs will hatch in a few days.

hateful.en: His hateful words hurt her feelings.
hateful.zh: 他可惡的話傷了她的心。

headline.en: The news headline was about the storm.
headline.zh: 新聞標題是關於那場暴風雨。

headquarters.en: The company's headquarters is in Taipei.
headquarters.zh: 這家公司的總部在台北。

heal.en: The cut will heal in a week.
heal.zh: 這個傷口一週後會癒合。

heap.en: There was a heap of leaves in the yard.

heater.en: We turned on the heater in winter.

heel.en: Her shoe rubbed against her heel.

hell.en: The long wait felt like hell.
hell.zh: 漫長的等待簡直像地獄。

helmet.en: Always wear a helmet when biking.
helmet.zh: 騎腳踏車時一定要戴安全帽。

hesitate.en: Don't hesitate to ask for help.
hesitate.zh: 需要幫忙別猶豫，儘管開口。

hint.en: Give me a hint about the answer.
hint.zh: 給我一點關於答案的提示。

hire.en: The shop hired two new workers.
hire.zh: 這家店雇用了兩名新員工。

historian.en: The historian wrote about ancient kings.
historian.zh: 這位歷史學家寫了古代的君王。

historic.en: It was a historic moment for the country.
historic.zh: 那對國家來說是個歷史性的時刻。

holder.en: Put your pen in the pen holder.

hollow.en: The tree had a hollow trunk.
hollow.zh: 那棵樹的樹幹是中空的。

holy.en: People visit this holy place to pray.

homesick.en: She felt homesick at summer camp.

hometown.en: He returned to his hometown for the holiday.

honor.en: It is an honor to meet you.

hopeful.en: She is hopeful about the future.

horn.en: The driver honked the car horn.

hourly.en: The buses run on an hourly schedule.

hug.en: She gave her mother a warm hug.
hug.zh: 她給了媽媽一個溫暖的擁抱。

hum.en: She hummed a song while cooking.

humid.en: Summer in Taiwan is hot and humid.
humid.zh: 台灣的夏天又熱又潮濕。

humor.en: He has a great sense of humor.

humorous.zh: 她講了一個幽默的故事。

hunger.en: The poor child cried from hunger.
hunger.zh: 那個貧窮的孩子餓得哭了。

hut.en: They lived in a small wooden hut.
hut.zh: 他們住在一間小木屋裡。

icy.en: Be careful on the icy road.

immediate.en: The sick man needs immediate help.
immediate.zh: 這名病人需要立即的幫助。

impress.zh: 她的演講讓大家印象深刻。

indoor.en: We played an indoor game when it rained.
indoor.zh: 下雨時我們玩室內遊戲。

indoors.en: Let's stay indoors during the storm.
indoors.zh: 暴風雨時我們待在室內吧。

industrial.en: This is an industrial area with many factories.
industrial.zh: 這是個有許多工廠的工業區。

inferior.en: The cheap shoes are of inferior quality.
inferior.zh: 這雙便宜的鞋品質較差。

inform.en: Please inform me of any changes.

information.zh: 我在網路上找到有用的資訊。

injury.en: He missed the game because of an injury.
injury.zh: 他因為受傷而錯過了比賽。

inn.en: We stayed at a small inn for the night.
inn.zh: 我們在一家小旅館過夜。

inner.en: She felt a sense of inner peace.
inner.zh: 她感到一種內心的平靜。

inspector.zh: 檢查員檢查了這棟建築。

intelligent.zh: 海豚是非常聰明的動物。

interrupt.en: Please don't interrupt while I'm speaking.

inventor.en: The inventor created a useful tool.
inventor.zh: 這位發明家創造了一個有用的工具。

invitation.en: I received an invitation to the party.
invitation.zh: 我收到了派對的邀請函。

ivory.en: It is illegal to sell ivory.

jail.en: The thief was put in jail.

jar.en: She filled the jar with cookies.

jaw.en: He hurt his jaw in the accident.

jazz.en: He enjoys listening to jazz music.

jealous.en: She was jealous of her sister's new toy.

jeep.en: They drove a jeep across the desert.
jeep.zh: 他們開吉普車穿越沙漠。

jet.en: The jet flew high above the clouds.

jewel.en: The crown was covered with jewels.

jewelry.en: She keeps her jewelry in a small box.
jewelry.zh: 她把珠寶放在一個小盒子裡。

journey.en: Their journey across the country took a week.
journey.zh: 他們橫越這個國家的旅程花了一週。

joyful.en: It was a joyful family reunion.
joyful.zh: 那是一場歡樂的家庭團聚。

juicy.en: The orange was sweet and juicy.

jungle.en: Tigers live in the thick jungle.
jungle.zh: 老虎住在茂密的叢林裡。

junior.en: He is a junior member of the club.
junior.zh: 他是這個社團的資淺成員。

junk.en: The garage is full of old junk.

kangaroo.en: A kangaroo carries its baby in a pouch.
kangaroo.zh: 袋鼠用育兒袋帶著寶寶。

keyboard.en: He types fast on the keyboard.

kidney.en: The kidney removes waste from the body.
kidney.zh: 腎臟負責排除身體的廢物。

kilometer.en: The race is ten kilometers long.

kindergarten.en: My little brother goes to kindergarten.

kingdom.en: The king ruled a peaceful kingdom.
kingdom.zh: 國王統治著一個和平的王國。

kit.en: Keep a first-aid kit in the car.

knight.en: The brave knight fought the dragon.

knit.zh: 奶奶織了一條溫暖的圍巾。

knot.en: He tied a knot in the rope.

koala.en: The koala slept in the tree.

label.en: Read the label before you buy it.

lace.en: Her dress was decorated with white lace.
lace.zh: 她的洋裝以白色蕾絲裝飾。

ladder.en: He climbed the ladder to fix the roof.

laughter.en: The room was full of laughter.

laundry.en: I need to do the laundry today.

lawn.en: He mows the lawn every weekend.

leak.en: There is a leak in the water pipe.

leap.en: The frog took a big leap.

learning.en: Reading is an important part of learning.
learning.zh: 閱讀是學習的重要部分。

leather.en: He bought a brown leather wallet.

leisure.en: She reads books in her leisure time.

lemonade.en: We drank cold lemonade in the heat.
lemonade.zh: 炎熱中我們喝了冰檸檬水。

leopard.en: A leopard can run very fast.

lettuce.en: Add some lettuce to the sandwich.
lettuce.zh: 在三明治裡加一些萵苣。

lighthouse.en: The lighthouse guided the ships at night.
lighthouse.zh: 燈塔在夜裡為船隻指引方向。

lightning.en: Lightning lit up the dark sky.
lightning.zh: 閃電照亮了黑暗的天空。

lily.en: A white lily grew by the pond.
lily.zh: 一朵白百合長在池塘邊。

limb.zh: 伸展能讓你的四肢保持靈活。

litter.en: Please don't litter in the park.
litter.zh: 請不要在公園亂丟垃圾。

lively.en: The party was lively and fun.

loaf.en: She baked a loaf of bread.

lobby.en: We waited in the hotel lobby.

locate.en: The shop is located near the station.

location.en: This is a good location for a store.

lock.en: Please lock the door when you leave.

log.en: He threw a log onto the fire.
log.zh: 他把一根木頭扔進火裡。

lollipop.en: The child enjoyed a sweet lollipop.
lollipop.zh: 那個小孩享受著甜甜的棒棒糖。

loose.en: The button on my shirt is loose.

lord.en: The land belonged to a powerful lord.
lord.zh: 這塊土地屬於一位有權勢的領主。

loser.en: He is a good loser and never complains.

lover.en: She is a great lover of music.
lover.zh: 她是個非常熱愛音樂的人。

luggage.en: We carried our luggage onto the train.
